text.heading: IMPORTANT NOTICE
text.p: 1. NIGHT VIGIL IS NOT ALLOWED ON THIS PRAYER HILL
2. HOURS OF PRAYERS ARE AS FOLLOW: - PRAYER MEETING HOLD EVERY FRIDAY AT 4:00 PM
3. REVIVAL SERVICE HOLD LAST WEDNESDAY TO FRIDAY OF EVERY MONTH, TIME 4:00 PM
3. PLEASE KEEP THE HOUSE OF GOD CLEAN AT ALL TIME
4. NOBODY IS ALLOWED TO HOLD ANY SPECIAL PRAYER ON THIS PRAYER HILL WITHOUT THE PERMISSION OF THE COMMITTEE OF THE HOUSE OF GOD
